title: Refunds failing for international transactions
root_cause: Refund validation logic did not handle multi-currency amounts after code refactor
resolution: Added currency conversion step before amount validation

title: Order cancellation timeout under high load
root_cause: Synchronous refund call blocking order cancellation flow during peak traffic
resolution: Made refund call async with 5s timeout

title: Inventory count going negative for flash sale items
root_cause: Race condition in stock deduction - no optimistic locking on concurrent requests
resolution: Added database-level optimistic locking with version column

title: Validation bypass allowing negative order amounts
root_cause: validate_positive_amount only checked for zero, not negative values

title: Payment gateway 5xx errors causing order state corruption
root_cause: Missing error handling on gateway timeout - order marked as paid but payment never completed
resolution: Added idempotent retry with payment state verification before order status update

title: Refund endpoint returning 500 for already-refunded orders
root_cause: No idempotency check - duplicate refund request hit unique constraint in DB
resolution: Added idempotency check before processing refund
